• Kai Gao

    Kai Gao

    Ph.D candidate at Peking University

    • Beijing, China
    • Email
    • Github
    • ORCID

    I am a Ph.D. candidate in the Software Engineering at School of Software Engineering and Microelectronics Peking University, advised by Minghui Zhou and Bing Xie at Open Source Software Data Analytics Lab. Before that, I received my Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science and Economy at Peking University in 2019. My research interests mainly focus on mining software repository and empirical studies for open-source software ecosystems and supply chain.

    Education

    • 09/2019~Now, Peking University, PhD Candidate in Software Engineering
    • 09/2017~07/2019, Peking University, Bachelor of Economy (Dual Major)
    • 09/2015~07/2019, Peking University, Bachelor of Computer Science (Major)

    Publications

    Conference

    1. [ICSE’22] An Exploratory Study of Deep Learning Supply Chain. (CCF A)
      Xin Tan, Kai Gao, Minghui Zhou, Li Zhang [PDF] [Code] [Webpage]
      In: The 44th International Conference on Software Engineering, May 21-29, 2022, pages to appear, Pittsburgh, PA, USA

    2. [ICPC’22] Demystifying Software Release Note Issues on GitHub. (CCF B)
      Jianyu Wu, Hao He, Wenxin Xiao, Kai Gao, and Minghui Zhou [PDF] [Code]
      In: The 30th International Conference on Program Comprehension, May 16-17, 2022, pages to appear, Pittsburgh, PA, USA

    Journal

    1. [TSE’22] On the Variability of Software Engineering Needs for Deep Learning: Stages, Trends, and Application Types. (CCF A)
      Kai Gao, Zhixing Wang, Audris Mockus,and Minghui Zhou [PDF] [Code]
      In: Transactions of Software Engineering, to Appear, 2022.

    Teaching Experience

    • Quantitative Analysis on Open Source Software, Teaching Assistant, Spring 2022
